core_skills: Python, Java, Golang, Distributed Systems, Event-driven Programming
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, Java:1.0, Golang:1.0, Distributed Systems:0.0, Event-driven Programming:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information systems, or closely related quantitative discipline, Typically, 4-7 years' experience, Strong programming proficiency in at least two of the following languages: Python, Java, or Golang, Good understanding of distributed systems, event-driven programming paradigms, and designing for scale and performance, Experience with cloud-native applications, developer tools, managed services, and next-generation databases, Knowledge of DevOps practices like CI/CD, infrastructure as code, containerization, and orchestration using Kubernetes, Good written and verbal communication skills and agile in a changing environment
preferred_quals: Master's degree, Cloud Architectures, Cross Domain Knowledge, Design Thinking, Development Fundamentals, DevOps, Distributed Computing, Microservices Fluency, Full Stack Development, Release Management
core_responsibilities: Analyses the feature specifications and determines the required coding, testing, and integration activities, Designs and develops moderate to complex cloud application modules per feature specifications adhering to security policies, Identifies debugs and creates solutions for issues with code and integration into application architecture, Develops and executes comprehensive test plans for features adhering to performance, scale, usability, and security requirements, Deploy systems and applications code using continuous integration/deployment (CI/CD) pipelines to automate applications' management, scaling, and deployment, Contributes towards innovation and integration of new technologies into projects, Analyzes science, engineering, business, and other data processing problems to develop and implement solutions to complex application problems, system administration issues, or network concerns
job_summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. They are seeking a Software Engineer to build innovative cloud-based solutions and collaborate with project managers to ensure effective delivery and support of Cloud engagements.
